user.title: Event Countdown
user.description: Click Submit to create the global configuration. Use **Add Entry** on the integration to add events.

data_description.year: Birth year / founding year — used to calculate age. Leave empty if unknown.
data_description.soon: Highlighted as upcoming when this many days remain.
data_description.recurring: On = repeats every year. Off = skipped once the date has passed.
